Leverage
1 Step
Forex1:30
Metals, Indices & Energy1:5
Crypto1:1
2 Steps
Forex1:100
Metals, Indices & Energy1:5
Crypto1:1
Instant Funded (Zero)
Forex1:50
Metals, Indices & Energy1:5
Crypto1:1
Commissions
Forex
1 Step, 2 Steps & 2 Steps Pro$5 / lot
Instant Zero$7 / lot
Other Instruments
Indices & Energy (All Accounts)No Commission
Crypto (All Accounts)0.04% / lot
Account Sizes
1 Step
$5K — $100K
2 Steps
$5K — $100K
2 Steps Pro
$5K — $200K
Zero (Instant)
$5K — $200K
Max Allocation & Merging
$300K
Max Merged Account Size
Accounts can be merged up to $300,000
Accounts must be the same challenge type to merge
Merging not allowed with open trades
Accounts with negative balance cannot be merged
Merging available for funded accounts only, not challenges
Scaled accounts cannot be merged
Merging not supported in Instant Zero accounts
Daily & Maximum Loss
1 Step
Daily 3%Max 6%
2 Steps
Daily 5%Max 10%
2 Steps Pro
Daily 3%Max 6%
Zero
Daily 3%Max 5%
Drawdown Type
All challenges and funded accounts
Static Equity Based Drawdown
Zero (Instant)
Trailing Drawdown
Risk Management
1 Step, 2 Steps & 2 Steps Pro: A 3% floating drawdown on any open trades is not allowed. Violating this rule results in account closure.
Zero: A 1% floating drawdown on any open trades is not allowed. Violating this rule results in account closure.
Lot Exposure Limit: Maximum 20 lots per click/trade. The platform will not allow larger sizes in a single click. This is a per-trade restriction.
Consistency Rules
1 Step, 2 Steps & 2 Steps Pro: No consistency rule — unless you select the daily payout option (requires 35% consistency)
Instant Zero: 15% consistency rule
Minimum Trading Days
1 Step & 2 Steps
3 Days
2 Steps Pro
1 Day
Zero
7 Days
News Trading
Allowed
News trading allowed on all challenges
Deliberate and consistent news trading is prohibited and will result in account termination
Restrictions
For 1 Step, 2 Steps & 2 Steps funded accounts: opening or closing a trade 5 minutes before/after a high-impact news event is not allowed — profits will not count, unless the trade was opened/closed 5 hours before the event
For Zero account: opening or closing a trade within 5 minutes before/after high-impact news is not allowed and will result in account termination
Overnight & Weekend Holding
You can hold trades overnight and over the weekend — All Accounts except Zero
Swap fees are included in the loss limit
Copy Trading
Allowed
You can use a trade copier from a Funding Pips account (as master) to an external account (as follower)
All accounts must be in your name
Not Allowed
Copy trading from personal accounts or other prop firms into Funding Pips challenges or accounts
Copy trading between Funding Pips accounts owned by different users is not allowed
Expert Advisors (EAs)
Allowed
EAs for risk management only
Not Allowed
Third-party EA trading
VPN / VPS
Use a paid VPN or VPS with a dedicated IP — each time you connect
Free VPNs are not allowed — sharing the same IP poses security risks and may result in account loss
Sharing a VPS connection with others is prohibited
You can travel and access your account from anywhere — provide a boarding pass, passport stamp, and a live video showing your presence in the new location
Profit Share
60%
Every Tuesday
1 Step & 2 Steps
80%
Bi-Weekly
1 Step, 2 Steps & 2 Steps Pro
90%
On Demand
1 Step & 2 Steps (with conditions)
95%
Bi-Weekly
Instant Zero only
100%
Monthly
1 Step & 2 Steps — every 30 days
Payout Policy
60%
Every Tuesday
Request every Tuesday
80%
Bi-Weekly
Every 14 calendar days after first executed trade
90%
On Demand
Requires 35% consistency rule — resets after each reward. Min on-demand payout is 2%
100%
Monthly
Every 30 calendar days after first executed trade
Scaling Plan
Level 1
Condition4 payouts & 10% total profit
Capital Boost+20%
Max Drawdown Increase+1%
Level 2
Condition8 payouts & 20% total profit
Capital Boost+30%
Max Drawdown Increase+1% additional
Daily Loss+1%
Level 3
Condition12 payouts & 30% total profit
Capital Boost+40%
Max Drawdown Increase+1% additional
Level 4 🏆
Condition16 payouts & 40% total profit
Capital BoostBalance Doubled
Payout100% On Demand
Max Capital$2,000,000
Monthly BonusesYes
Total risk increase: Max Drawdown +4% and Daily Loss +2% across all levels. All boosts calculated from original account size — Merging does not affect the scaling plan.
Inactivity Rules
Account will be closed if no trade is opened or closed within 30 consecutive days
Prohibited Strategies
Gap Trading
High Frequency Trading
Server Slamming
Arbitrage
Hedging
Tick Scalping
Restricted Countries
🇮🇷 Iran
🇦🇪 UAE
🇻🇳 Vietnam

About Us

Who We Are · What We Do

Our Mission

We built Prop Firm Simple as traders ourselves. We were tired of wasting hours comparing firms across different websites, missing deals, and hitting hidden fees. So we built the solution ourselves.

Our platform gives you a clear side-by-side view of every major prop firm — challenges, rules, payouts, and exclusive discount codes — all in one place. No complexity, no bias, just the data you need.

3+
Prop Firms
100%
Free to Use
24/7
Always Updated
W
CEO
FOUNDER & CEO
Wesam Aljarah

Trader, builder, and the mind behind Prop Firm Simple. Wesam created this platform after experiencing the frustration of navigating the prop firm world firsthand — and decided to make it simple for everyone.

🚀 Founder 📈 Forex Trader 💡 Builder
← BACK

FAQ

Frequently Asked Questions

What is the difference between 1-step, 2-step and instant funded?
A 2-step requires passing two evaluation phases before getting funded. A 1-step skips the second phase — higher cost, faster path. Instant funded means no evaluation at all — you trade live immediately, usually with tighter drawdown rules and a lower payout split.
What is max drawdown and how is it calculated?
Max drawdown is the maximum total loss allowed before your account is closed. Most firms calculate it from the initial balance (static), others from the highest equity reached (trailing). Trailing is stricter — a strong run followed by a pullback can breach your limit even if you're still in profit.
Can I hold trades over the weekend or during news events?
Depends on the firm. Some allow overnight and weekend holding, others don't. Most restrict trading 2–5 minutes around high impact news events — violating this voids profits or closes the account. Always check the firm's specific rules before entering a position near a macro release like NFP or FOMC.
How do payouts actually work — when and how much?
Payout splits vary by firm and plan — typically 70–90%. The schedule matters too: some pay weekly, others bi-weekly, and some require a minimum profit or winning days before you can request a payout.
Is copy trading or using EAs allowed?
Most firms allow EAs and algorithmic trading with restrictions. Copy trading between accounts of the same firm or from other prop firms is usually prohibited. Some firms allow copying from your funded account to an external account as master, but not the reverse.
What happens if I lose my funded account — can I reset it?
Most firms offer paid resets or allow you to repurchase the challenge at a discount. Some have free reset conditions. Finotive Funding stands out — after your first payout you get a free challenge account.
How do I use the discount code?
Click any Buy button on the platform. For Funding Pips the referral code is embedded directly in the link. For The Trading Pit, the code is automatically copied to your clipboard when you click — paste it in the discount field at checkout.
How do I contact you or report outdated data?
Use the Contact page from the footer. If you spot a rule change, pricing update, or anything incorrect, let us know — we'll verify and update it. We'd rather have traders point out errors than have someone make a decision based on stale data.

Privacy Policy

Last Updated: March 2026

Information We Collect

We only collect what we need to run this platform. This includes basic usage data such as pages visited and interactions, which we use solely to improve the user experience. We do not collect or store any personal financial information.

How We Use Your Information

Any data collected is used to understand how the platform is used, fix issues, and improve. We do not sell, rent, or share your data with third parties for marketing purposes.

Affiliate Links

Some buttons on this platform are affiliate links. When you click and purchase, we may receive a commission at no extra cost to you. This is how we keep the platform free.

Cookies

We may use limited cookies to remember your preferences and improve your browsing experience. You can disable them from your browser settings at any time.

Third-Party Sites

This platform contains links to external prop firm websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices of those sites. Please review their policies before purchasing.

Contact

If you have any questions about this policy, please contact us via our Contact page.

← BACK

TERMS

Terms & Conditions · March 2026

Use of Platform

Prop Firm Simple is an informational and comparison platform. By using this site, you agree to use it for lawful purposes only. We reserve the right to restrict access to users who misuse the platform.

Accuracy of Information

We work hard to keep data accurate and up to date, but we do not guarantee that every piece of information reflects the current state of each firm. Always verify sensitive details directly with the prop firm before purchasing.

Affiliate Disclaimer

This platform contains affiliate links. We may receive compensation when you click and complete a purchase. This does not affect the objectivity of our comparisons or reviews.

User Reviews

Reviews submitted by users are their own opinions. We do not verify any claims in reviews or endorse them. Prop Firm Simple is not responsible for decisions made based on user-submitted content.

Limitation of Liability

Prop Firm Simple is not responsible for any financial losses arising from using Prop Firms listed on this platform. Trading involves risk — always do your own due diligence.

Changes to Terms

We may update these terms at any time. Continued use of the platform means you accept any changes.
